title: Marshall SDS Plus Brick Removal/Masonry Chisel, Carbide-Tipped Heat-Treated Flat Blade, for Brick Removal, Cavity Inspection and Mortar Work
features: CARBIDE TIPPED: Brick Removing Chisel ideal for cavity inspection work when brick removal is the only option
HEAT-TREATED BLADE: Flat blade constructed with specific heat-treatment tolerances to achieve optimal balance of toughness and wear resistance
VERSATILE APPLICATION: Specially designed Masonry Chisel for cavity inspection work where brick removal is necessary, offering precise control and efficiency
MORTAR COMPATIBILITY: Effectively works with various types of mortar, making it ideal for brick removal and masonry modification tasks
SDS PLUS SYSTEM: Features SDS Plus connection for secure tool attachment and reliable power transfer during operation
description: Product Description SDS Plus Brick Remover Chisel Whether it’s a general purpose chisel or an application specific tool required, our diverse range has chiselling with an SDS Plus machine covered. Our innovation chisels include problem solving designs such as the cranked shaft Channelling Chisels which rapidly produce channels in masonry. The popular SDS Plus Scutch Comb Chisels are great for masonry dressing whilst the Carbide Tipped Raking Chisel is designed with a solid tungsten carbide strip insert for the ultimate performance in material removal. Hammers out the mortar around individual bricks or blocks to allow brick removal Ideal for applications such as installing brick lights, air bricks, replacing damaged brickwork and cavity access etc. Carbide tipped for extended life 10mm wide cutting edge. Minimises chance of brick damage. Transform your brick removal and cavity inspection work with this professional-grade SDS Plus Brick Remover Chisel. The meticulously engineered flat blade features specialized heat treatment, achieving precise tolerances that deliver the perfect balance of durability and wear resistance. This robust tool excels in mortar work applications, making it indispensable for construction professionals who need reliable performance. The SDS Plus fitting ensures secure attachment and efficient power transfer when used with compatible power tools. Whether you're conducting thorough cavity inspections that require selective brick removal or tackling challenging mortar work, this chisel's thoughtful design and construction make it an essential addition to your toolbox. The substantial blade length provides excellent reach and leverage, while the professional-grade construction ensures consistent performance in demanding conditions. Did you know? SDS = Slotted Drive System was invented by Bosch in 1975. There are two Standard Sizes - Plus and Max SDS-Plus is the most common by count of tools manufactured, with masonry drills from 4 mm diameter to 30 mm diameter readily available. The shortest SDS-plus masonry drill bits are about 110 mm overall length, and the longest is 1500 mm. There are many different use for the Chisels and AccurA carries the full range.
